name: NC Need-Based Scholarship
sponsor: North Carolina State Education Assistance Authority

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or eligible non-citizen; NC resident
eligibility.other_requirements: NC resident attending eligible NC postsecondary institution; demonstrated financial need; Pell Grant eligible

stackable_notes: State need-based grant; generally stacks with federal aid. May reduce institutional need-based grants at some schools.
notes: Relatively modest state need-based scholarship. Combined with the UNC Need-Based Grant for students at UNC System schools. NC has limited state financial aid compared to neighboring states — advise early filing of FAFSA.
